What we do

Treatments, considered
in fine detail.

A full range of modern dentistry under one roof — planned digitally, finished by hand, explained in plain language.

Your dentist

Dr. Kavitha Rajan

Cosmetic & Implant Dentistry

Dr. Kavitha founded Nila in 2014 after training in cosmetic and implant dentistry. She is known for a meticulous, unhurried approach — and a genuinely calm chair-side manner that puts even the most anxious patients at ease.

Awards & fellowships
Inside the studio

Same-day, single-visit dentistry.

Our in-house CEREC and 3D scanning let us design, mill and fit a crown in a single appointment — no putty moulds, no temporary, no second visit.

  • 01 Digital 3D intraoral scan — no goopy impressions
  • 02 Crown designed & milled in-house, same day
  • 03 Guided implant placement for precision
  • 04 Transparent, fixed-fee treatment plans

one roof.

Endodontics, paediatrics and oral surgery in-house — so your whole family is cared for in one place.

Good to know

Questions,
answered.

Do you offer same-day crowns? +
Yes. With in-house CEREC technology we design, mill and fit most crowns in a single visit — no temporary crown and no second appointment needed.
Is treatment painful? +
We plan every visit around your comfort, with gentle local anaesthetic and a calm, unhurried pace. Most patients are surprised by how relaxed the experience is.
Do you see children? +
Absolutely — our in-house paediatric dentist sees children from age two, with a playful, no-fear approach to first visits and check-ups.
Where are you, and what are your hours? +
We're at 14 Sterling Road, Kilpauk, Chennai 600 010. Open Monday to Saturday, 9:30am – 8:00pm, and Sunday by appointment.
Do you offer EMI or insurance? +
Yes — we offer fixed-fee plans with no-cost EMI options and support most major insurance providers. We'll walk you through costs before any treatment begins.
